description.value: Price 496 gp; Slot none; CL 5th; Weight 1/2 lb.; Aura faint evocation DESCRIPTION This +1 sling bullet makes a faint rattling noise when shaken. When it strikes a creature, the creature must succeed at a DC 13 Fortitude save or become stunned for 1 round. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Cost 251 gp; Feats Craft Magic Arms and Armor; Spells sound burst
